item.title: 👍Consuelo Echeverria - Washington Public Employees Association
item.description: Consuelo Echeverria signed up to testify Pro.

item.title: 👍MSLS,BSN, RN, Kathryn Lewandowsky - Washington Public Employees Association
item.description: MSLS,BSN, RN, Kathryn Lewandowsky signed up to testify Pro.

item.title: 👍Lonnie Johns-Brown - Health Care For All Washington
item.description: Lonnie Johns-Brown signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Health Care For All Washington.

item.title: 👍Sam Hatzenbeler - Economic Opportunity Institute
item.description: Sam Hatzenbeler signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Economic Opportunity Institute.

item.title: 👍💵Emily Brice - Northwest Health Law Advocates
item.description: Emily Brice signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Northwest Health Law Advocates. They are a registered lobbyist.

item.title: 👎💵Amber Ulvenes - Kaiser
item.description: Amber Ulvenes signed up to testify Con. They are signed up to represent Kaiser. They are a registered lobbyist.

item.title: 👎💵Carrie Tellefson - Regence BlueShield
item.description: Carrie Tellefson signed up to testify Con. They are signed up to represent Regence BlueShield. They are a registered lobbyist.

item.title: 👎💵Christine Brewer - Premera
item.description: Christine Brewer signed up to testify Con. They are signed up to represent Premera. They are a registered lobbyist.

item.title: 👎💵David Foster - Assoc of WA Healthcare Plans
item.description: David Foster signed up to testify Con. They are signed up to represent Assoc of WA Healthcare Plans. They are a registered lobbyist.

item.title: 👍Jim Freeburg - Patient Coalition of Washington
item.description: Jim Freeburg signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Patient Coalition of Washington.

item.title: Where the budget stands — and what comes next - Sen. June Robinson
item.description: News article "Where the budget stands — and what comes next - Sen. June Robinson" from Senate Democrats.
